'''fazuchu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:oldhamite|oldhamite]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| f-z-ch
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:oldhamite|oldhamite]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| fazuchu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:fæzichith|fæzichith]] || [[word:fæzichij|fæzichij]] || [[word:fæzichish|fæzichish]] || [[word:fæzichi|fæzichi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:fazuzuchuth|fazuzuchuth]] || [[word:fazuzuchuj|fazuzuchuj]] || [[word:fazuzuchush|fazuzuchush]] || [[word:fazuzuchu|fazuzuchu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:fazuchuth|fazuchuth]] || [[word:fazuchuj|fazuchuj]] || [[word:fazuchush|fazuchush]] || [[word:fazuchu|fazuchu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:fazufchuth|fazufchuth]] || [[word:fazufchuj|fazufchuj]] || [[word:fazufchush|fazufchush]] || [[word:fazufchuf|fazufchuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:fazuchuthu|fazuchuthu]] || [[word:fazuchuju|fazuchuju]] || [[word:fazuchushu|fazuchushu]] || [[word:fazuchuku|fazuchuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:fazuchuth|fazuchuth]] || [[word:fazuchuj|fazuchuj]] || [[word:fazuchush|fazuchush]] || [[word:fazuchu|fazuchu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:fazuchuthul|fazuchuthul]] || [[word:fazuchujul|fazuchujul]] || [[word:fazuchushul|fazuchushul]] || [[word:fazuchukul|fazuchukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:fazuchuthuthu|fazuchuthuthu]] || [[word:fazuchujuju|fazuchujuju]] || [[word:fazuchushushu|fazuchushushu]] || [[word:fazuchuku|fazuchuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:fazuchuthun|fazuchuthun]] || [[word:fazuchujun|fazuchujun]] || [[word:fazuchushun|fazuchushun]] || [[word:fazuchukun|fazuchukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:fazuchuthuoro|fazuchuthuoro]] || [[word:fazuchujuoro|fazuchujuoro]] || [[word:fazuchushuoro|fazuchushuoro]] || [[word:fazuchukuoro|fazuchukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|59e8839}}
